title: OGA/NSTA annual report and accounts, 2024 to 2025
body: "This report sets out the activities of the organisation over the period 1 April 2024 to 31 March 2025. It includes:   statement from the Chair and Chief Executive strategic report accountability report remuneration and staff report financial statements   On 21 March 2022, the Oil and Gas Authority (OGA) became known by a new business name: North Sea Transition Authority (NSTA), to reflect its evolving role in the energy transition. The OGA remains the legal name of the company.  "
